
Mortality {data-navmenu="Population"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Fishing Mortality by Fleet

```{r fm_trend}
mv_plot_trend_multi(
  df     = mv$fishing_mortality,
  group  = "fleet",
  ylab   = "Fishing mortality (F)",
  title  = "Fishing Mortality by Fleet",
  colours = mv_fleet_colours(fleet_names = fleets)
)
```

### Exploitation Rates

```{r hr_trend}
lu_df <- mv$legal_hr
lu_df$type <- "Legal"
p <- mv_plot_trend(
  df     = lu_df,
  ylab   = "Harvest rate",
  colour = "#1f77b4",
  title  = "Exploitation Rates",
  ref_line = if (has_refpts && !is.null(mv$ref_points$lUmsy))
    mv$ref_points$lUmsy else NULL,
  ref_label = if (has_refpts && !is.null(mv$ref_points$lUmsy))
    "lUmsy" else NULL
)
p
```

### Natural Mortality

```{r nm_display, eval=!is.null(mv$natural_mortality)}
nm <- mv$natural_mortality
if (is.data.frame(nm) && "sex" %in% names(nm) &&
    !"year" %in% names(nm)) {
  # Constant M by sex
  knitr::kable(
    x = nm,
    caption = "Natural mortality rate",
    digits = 4
  )
} else if (is.data.frame(nm) && "year" %in% names(nm)) {
  mv_plot_surface(
    df    = nm,
    ylab  = "Age",
    xlab  = "Year",
    title = "Natural Mortality at Age"
  )
}
```
